title: Add /login and /register HTTP endpoints
description: Create Next.js route handlers at src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts and src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts that expose the existing register/login business logic as HTTP POST endpoints. The register endpoint should accept email, password, and confirmPassword; the login endpoint should accept email and password. Both should return JWT tokens on success with appropriate HTTP status codes (201 for register, 200 for login, 409 for duplicate email, 401 for invalid credentials, 400 for validation errors).
existing_patterns: src/app/api/enroll/route.ts - Next.js route handler pattern using POST and withAuth
src/app/api/health/route.ts - simple route handler returning JSON response
src/api/auth/register.ts - existing register function with email/password validation
src/api/auth/login.ts - existing login function with credential verification
